question_title: Will the community prediction be higher than 33.00% on 2026-04-25 for the Metaculus question "Will the DOJ officially remove the requirement for U.S. attorneys to consult with the Public Integrity Section before prosecuting lawmakers before November 4, 2026?"?
summary: This meta-prediction asks whether the Metaculus CP on question 38209 (DOJ removing PIN consultation requirement) will be above 33.00% on April 25, 2026. The CP has shown a consistent 5-week downward trend from 43% to 33.00% (the exact threshold). The key finding is that the consultation requirement has been "suspended" since June 2025 but NOT officially removed - the Justice Manual says "suspended while revisions are ongoing." This suspension doesn't meet the resolution criteria, which likely explains the declining CP. Todd Blanche became acting AG in early April but CP continued declining, suggesting forecasters have already incorporated this. No news catalyst suggests imminent formal removal. The downward trend dominates, but the razor-thin margin (CP exactly at threshold) and possibility of random fluctuations or unexpected catalysts prevent extreme confidence in NO.

factors.description: Consistent downward CP trend: 43% → 39% → 36% → 36% → 35% → 33% over 5 weeks (per question description), avg -2pp/week. Strong momentum favoring continued decline below threshold.

No news catalyst for upward CP movement: The consultation requirement has been 'suspended' since June 2025 (10 months) without formal removal. Justice Manual confirms 'suspended while revisions are ongoing.' No reports suggest imminent official action.

Blanche appointment already priced in: Todd Blanche (who originally proposed PIN reorganization) became acting AG ~April 3, but CP continued declining from 35% to 33%, suggesting forecasters don't see this as significantly increasing probability of official removal.

Razor-thin margin: CP is exactly at threshold (33.00%). Due to rounding (Metaculus displays integers), true CP could be slightly above or below. Even small fluctuations could push it either way on the resolution date.
CP noise and discrete jumps: With 135 forecasters, individual new forecasts can move CP. Over 12 days, some random upward movement is possible despite the trend.
Possibility Blanche formalizes removal: As acting AG with authority to update the Justice Manual, he could formalize the requirement removal within 12 days. Low probability but high impact on CP.

reasoning:
**Forecast: 0.25 (25% probability that CP will be above 33.00% on April 25)**

Key reasoning:

1. **Strong downward trend**: The CP has declined steadily from 43% to 33% over 5 weeks, averaging -2 percentage points per week. Extrapolating this trend suggests CP around 30% by April 25.

2. **Suspended ≠ Removed**: The Justice Manual explicitly states the consultation requirement is "suspended while revisions are ongoing" (since June 2025). This suspension does NOT meet the underlying question's resolution criteria, which requires *official removal*. This distinction likely drives the declining CP as forecasters recognize the DOJ may never formally remove the requirement.

3. **No catalyst identified**: Todd Blanche became acting AG on ~April 3 but the CP continued declining. No recent news suggests imminent formal action on the Justice Manual provisions.

4. **Thin margin provides some upside**: The CP sits exactly at the threshold, so even minor random fluctuations could push it above 33%. But the trend must overcome this noise — and the trend strongly favors further decline.
sources_consulted: [(Metaculus) Will the DOJ officially remove the requirement for U.S. attorneys to consult with the Public Integrity Section before prosecuting lawmakers before November 4, 2026?](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/38209)
[The Justice Department Had 36 Lawyers Fighting Corruption Full-Time. Under Trump, It’s Down to Two.](https://www.notus.org/courts/doj-public-integrity)
resolution_criteria: This question will resolve based on the community prediction of the Metaculus question found [here](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/38209) (i.e. the 'target question'). If the community prediction of the target question on 2026-04-25 07:01:29 is higher than 33.00%, this question will resolve to 'Yes'. If it is lower or equal to 33.00%, this question will resolve to 'No'. If the target question has already resolved before this question opens, then this question will be annulled. If the target question resolves after this question opens, but before 2026-04-25 07:01:29, then this question will resolve to the same value as the target question.
